enchantment.minecraft.impaling.desc: Increases damage by 1 each level, also make trident pierce through mobs
enchantment.minecraft.loyalty.desc: Trident stays in your inventory after throwing it
enchantment.minecraft.riptide.desc: Using the trident while in rain or water will launch the user forward, and give 5 seconds of slow falling
enchantment.minecraft.channeling.desc: When the trident is thrown at an enemy, a lightning will be summoned
